problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
mechanism: Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry
hypothesis: If Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry is applied to formation, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
